summary: The P2P header test utility divergence is semicolon-only rustfmt noise in stream and async returns; no test utility behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 182: M	crates/net/p2p/src/test_utils/headers.rs.
The isolated patch only adds semicolons to queued header, buffer, done, error, request error, and injected error returns.
No batching, download initialization, stream error conversion, request error mapping, or mocked response behavior changed.
